visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a 2D animated scene of a news studio. A male character named 'Senior' is dressed in a professional suit and tie, standing behind a news desk. A green, smiling lime-shaped character floats to his right. (2) The scene shifts to real-life footage of heavy rain falling on green foliage in a city park setting. A man in a suit is seen standing in the rain with a distressed expression. (3) A graphic screen appears with a large, brush-stroke text '颱風' (Typhoon) on a white background. (4) The video transitions to rapid clips of real-world K-pop performances, showing female and male groups dancing on large stages with vibrant lighting. The Kaohsiung Music Center is shown illuminated in bright purple light at night. (5) Another graphic screen appears with the large text '韓風' (Korean Wave). (6) The animation returns, showing a bald male character in a black t-shirt crawling painfully across a wooden floor toward a bathroom door. A close-up shows his face twisted in agony. (7) A final graphic screen appears with the large text '痛風' (Gout).
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: 2025台灣重大新聞總結. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. [Subtitle]: 大家好 我是學長. [Logo]: SHAWN NEWS. [Subtitle]: 主播：學長. (2) [Subtitle]: 眼見2025年即將進入尾聲. (3) [Subtitle]: 我要在以此向各位報告. (4) [Subtitle]: 台灣這一年發生的各種大事件. (5) [Subtitle]: 而每一個大事件. (6) [Subtitle]: 都離不開一個字. (7) [Subtitle]: 風. (8) [Subtitle]: 今年 台灣發生了許多件關於風的事件. (9) [Subtitle]: 全台大雨下不停. (10) [Subtitle]: 各地因為大雨大風頻傳災情. (11) [Subtitle]: 而造成這些狀況的源頭. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們稱作它為. (13) [Subtitle]: 颱風. (14) [Subtitle]: 而今年台灣更是來了許多大勢韓團. (15) [Subtitle]: 包含BLACKPINK Super Junior TWICE等等. (16) [Subtitle]: 幾乎場場都爆滿. (17) [Subtitle]: 甚至各地還亮起了該團的應援色. (18) [Subtitle]: 讓台灣瞬間刮起了許多次的. (19) [Subtitle]: 韓風. (20) [Subtitle]: 另外就在今年年初. (21) [Subtitle]: 在台百萬Youtuber突然在家站不起來. (22) [Subtitle]: 上廁所需要匍匐前進. (23) [Subtitle]: 醫生表示 這種情況. (24) [Subtitle]: 我們可以確認他是. (25) [Subtitle]: 痛風.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 animated news anchor, 1 animated character in pain, multiple K-pop group members on stage, 1 man in the rain.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An animated news anchor wearing a blue suit and red tie, and a bald animated man in a black t-shirt and blue shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A stylized animated news desk with a 'Shawn News' logo, a rainy urban park with trees, a professional concert stage with stadium seating, and a simple indoor bedroom with wooden floors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and professional clarity over an upbeat synth-pop BGM. The delivery is reminiscent of a news anchor. (2) As the rain footage appears, a low-frequency rumble and rain atmosphere layer into the mix. (3) A sharp 'Whoosh' sound effect transitions to the 'Typhoon' text, followed by an 'Impact' sound. (4) The music shifts to a more driving electronic beat with faint cheering and applause SFX as K-pop clips play. (5) Another 'Whoosh' and heavy 'Impact' trigger for the 'Korean Wave' title card. (6) The BGM continues as the narrator describes the YouTuber's situation. A comical, sliding friction sound effect accompanies the character crawling on the floor. (7) A final high-impact 'Boom' SFX lands as the word 'Gout' is spoken, ending on a sustained musical note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Category A (Typhoon) -> Category B (K-pop) -> Punchline (Gout)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a news summary format to perform a comedic linguistic bait-and-switch. It connects serious news topics containing the character '風' (Typhoon and Korean Wave) to a sudden personal health joke about 'Gout' (which translates literally to 'Pain-Wind').

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media animation with professional voice-over and clean audio-visual synchronization used for comedic storytelling.
